datasets.name: 0f183c45
queryLines:
SELECT 
  f.session_id,
  f.uid,
  f.phq9_score,
  f.phq9_severity,
  f.bdi_score,
  f.bdi_severity,
  f.createdAt,
  s.test_version
FROM anima.forms f
JOIN anima.sessions s ON f.session_id = s.session_id
ORDER BY f.createdAt DESC

datasets.name: e5884019
queryLines:
SELECT 
  sm.*,
  f.phq9_score,
  f.bdi_score,
  f.phq9_severity
FROM anima.scene_metrics sm
JOIN anima.forms f ON sm.session_id = f.session_id
WHERE sm.session_id = :selected_session
  AND sm.scene_type = 'stimulus'
ORDER BY sm.scene_index

datasets.name: 49e9bce6
queryLines:
SELECT
  session_id,
  AVG(fixation_count) as avg_fixation_count,
  AVG(mean_fixation_duration_ms) as avg_fixation_duration,
  AVG(dwell_time_ms_negative) as avg_dwell_negative,
  AVG(dwell_time_ms_positive) as avg_dwell_positive,
  AVG(dwell_time_ms_neutral) as avg_dwell_neutral,
  AVG(fixation_proportion_negative) as avg_prop_negative,
  AVG(fixation_proportion_positive) as avg_prop_positive,
  AVG(scanpath_length) as avg_scanpath_length,
  AVG(gaze_transition_entropy) as avg_entropy,
  AVG(blink_rate_per_min) as avg_blink_rate,
  COUNT(*) as n_stimulus_scenes
FROM anima.scene_metrics
WHERE session_id = :selected_session
  AND scene_type = 'stimulus'
GROUP BY session_id

datasets.name: 05aac086
queryLines:
SELECT 
  f.session_id,
  f.createdAt,
  f.phq9_score,
  f.bdi_score,
  CONCAT(f.createdAt, ' | PHQ-9=', f.phq9_score, ' BDI=', f.bdi_score, ' | ', f.session_id) as session_label
FROM anima.forms f
JOIN anima.sessions s ON f.session_id = s.session_id
WHERE f.uid = :selected_user
ORDER BY f.createdAt ASC

datasets.name: d8ae8260
queryLines:
SELECT 'Negative' as valence, AVG(dwell_time_ms_negative) as dwell_time_ms
FROM anima.scene_metrics
WHERE session_id = :selected_session AND scene_type = 'stimulus'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Positive', AVG(dwell_time_ms_positive)
FROM anima.scene_metrics
WHERE session_id = :selected_session AND scene_type = 'stimulus'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Neutral', AVG(dwell_time_ms_neutral)
FROM anima.scene_metrics
WHERE session_id = :selected_session AND scene_type = 'stimulus'

SELECT 
  f.session_id,
  f.createdAt,
  f.phq9_score,
  f.bdi_score,
  CONCAT(f.createdAt, ' | PHQ-9=', f.phq9_score, ' BDI=', f.bdi_score, ' | ', f.session_id) as session_label
FROM anima.forms f
JOIN anima.sessions s ON f.session_id = s.session_id
WHERE f.uid = :selected_user
ORDER BY f.createdAt ASC

datasets.name: be65bf0d
queryLines:
SELECT 
  'Negative' as valence, 
  AVG(dwell_time_ms_negative) as avg_dwell_ms,
  AVG(fixation_proportion_negative) as avg_fix_proportion,
  AVG(fixation_count_negative) as avg_fix_count
FROM anima.scene_metrics
WHERE scene_type = 'stimulus'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Positive', AVG(dwell_time_ms_positive), AVG(fixation_proportion_positive), AVG(fixation_count_positive)
FROM anima.scene_metrics WHERE scene_type = 'stimulus'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Neutral', AVG(dwell_time_ms_neutral), AVG(fixation_proportion_neutral), AVG(fixation_count_neutral)
FROM anima.scene_metrics WHERE scene_type = 'stimulus'

datasets.name: 93f61fe3
queryLines:
WITH session_data AS (
  SELECT
    AVG(fixation_count) as fixation_count,
    AVG(mean_fixation_duration_ms) as fixation_duration_ms,
    AVG(total_fixation_duration_ms) as total_fixation_duration_ms,
    AVG(fixation_rate_per_sec) as fixation_rate,
    AVG(scanpath_length) as scanpath_length,
    AVG(saccade_count) as saccade_count,
    AVG(saccade_rate_per_sec) as saccade_rate,
    AVG(mean_saccade_amplitude) as saccade_amplitude,
    AVG(blink_count) as blink_count,
    AVG(blink_rate_per_min) as blink_rate,
    AVG(transition_matrix_density) as transition_density,
    AVG(gaze_transition_entropy) as gaze_entropy,
    AVG(dwell_time_ms_negative) as dwell_negative,
    AVG(dwell_time_ms_positive) as dwell_positive,
    AVG(dwell_time_ms_neutral) as dwell_neutral,
    AVG(fixation_proportion_negative) as prop_negative,
    AVG(fixation_proportion_positive) as prop_positive,
    AVG(fixation_proportion_neutral) as prop_neutral,
    AVG(fixation_count_negative) as fix_count_negative,
    AVG(fixation_count_positive) as fix_count_positive,
    AVG(fixation_count_neutral) as fix_count_neutral,
    AVG(revisit_count_negative) as revisit_negative,
    AVG(revisit_count_positive) as revisit_positive,
    AVG(revisit_count_neutral) as revisit_neutral,
    AVG(ttff_ms_negative) as ttff_negative,
    AVG(ttff_ms_positive) as ttff_positive,
    AVG(ttff_ms_neutral) as ttff_neutral
  FROM anima.scene_metrics
  WHERE session_id = :selected_session AND scene_type = 'stimulus'
),
population_data AS (
  SELECT
    AVG(sm.fixation_count) as fixation_count,
    AVG(sm.mean_fixation_duration_ms) as fixation_duration_ms,
    AVG(sm.total_fixation_duration_ms) as total_fixation_duration_ms,
    AVG(sm.fixation_rate_per_sec) as fixation_rate,
    AVG(sm.scanpath_length) as scanpath_length,
    AVG(sm.saccade_count) as saccade_count,
    AVG(sm.saccade_rate_per_sec) as saccade_rate,
    AVG(sm.mean_saccade_amplitude) as saccade_amplitude,
    AVG(sm.blink_count) as blink_count,
    AVG(sm.blink_rate_per_min) as blink_rate,
    AVG(sm.transition_matrix_density) as transition_density,
    AVG(sm.gaze_transition_entropy) as gaze_entropy,
    AVG(sm.dwell_time_ms_negative) as dwell_negative,
    AVG(sm.dwell_time_ms_positive) as dwell_positive,
    AVG(sm.dwell_time_ms_neutral) as dwell_neutral,
    AVG(sm.fixation_proportion_negative) as prop_negative,
    AVG(sm.fixation_proportion_positive) as prop_positive,
    AVG(sm.fixation_proportion_neutral) as prop_neutral,
    AVG(sm.fixation_count_negative) as fix_count_negative,
    AVG(sm.fixation_count_positive) as fix_count_positive,
    AVG(sm.fixation_count_neutral) as fix_count_neutral,
    AVG(sm.revisit_count_negative) as revisit_negative,
    AVG(sm.revisit_count_positive) as revisit_positive,
    AVG(sm.revisit_count_neutral) as revisit_neutral,
    AVG(sm.ttff_ms_negative) as ttff_negative,
    AVG(sm.ttff_ms_positive) as ttff_positive,
    AVG(sm.ttff_ms_neutral) as ttff_neutral
  FROM anima.scene_metrics sm
  JOIN anima.forms f ON sm.session_id = f.session_id
  WHERE sm.scene_type = 'stimulus'
    AND (f.phq9_severity = :severity_filter OR :severity_filter = 'all')
)
SELECT 'Fixation Count' as metric, s.fixation_count as this_session, p.fixation_count as severity_group_avg FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Fixation Duration (ms)', s.fixation_duration_ms, p.fixation_duration_ms FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Total Fixation Duration (ms)', s.total_fixation_duration_ms, p.total_fixation_duration_ms FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Fixation Rate (/sec)', s.fixation_rate, p.fixation_rate FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Scanpath Length', s.scanpath_length, p.scanpath_length FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Saccade Count', s.saccade_count, p.saccade_count FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Saccade Rate (/sec)', s.saccade_rate, p.saccade_rate FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Saccade Amplitude', s.saccade_amplitude, p.saccade_amplitude FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Blink Count', s.blink_count, p.blink_count FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Blink Rate (/min)', s.blink_rate, p.blink_rate FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Transition Density', s.transition_density, p.transition_density FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Gaze Entropy', s.gaze_entropy, p.gaze_entropy FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Dwell Time Negative (ms)', s.dwell_negative, p.dwell_negative FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Dwell Time Positive (ms)', s.dwell_positive, p.dwell_positive FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Dwell Time Neutral (ms)', s.dwell_neutral, p.dwell_neutral FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Fix Proportion Negative', s.prop_negative, p.prop_negative FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Fix Proportion Positive', s.prop_positive, p.prop_positive FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Fix Proportion Neutral', s.prop_neutral, p.prop_neutral FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Fix Count Negative', s.fix_count_negative, p.fix_count_negative FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Fix Count Positive', s.fix_count_positive, p.fix_count_positive FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Fix Count Neutral', s.fix_count_neutral, p.fix_count_neutral FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Revisit Count Negative', s.revisit_negative, p.revisit_negative FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Revisit Count Positive', s.revisit_positive, p.revisit_positive FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'Revisit Count Neutral', s.revisit_neutral, p.revisit_neutral FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'TTFF Negative (ms)', s.ttff_negative, p.ttff_negative FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'TTFF Positive (ms)', s.ttff_positive, p.ttff_positive FROM session_data s, population_data p
UNION ALL SELECT 'TTFF Neutral (ms)', s.ttff_neutral, p.ttff_neutral FROM session_data s, population_data p

datasets.name: 5d74436a
queryLines:
SELECT 'Negative' as valence, AVG(fixation_proportion_negative) as fix_proportion
FROM anima.scene_metrics
WHERE session_id = :selected_session AND scene_type = 'stimulus'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Positive', AVG(fixation_proportion_positive)
FROM anima.scene_metrics
WHERE session_id = :selected_session AND scene_type = 'stimulus'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Neutral', AVG(fixation_proportion_neutral)
FROM anima.scene_metrics
WHERE session_id = :selected_session AND scene_type = 'stimulus'

datasets.name: f3b8b930
queryLines:
SELECT
  f.phq9_severity as severity,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sm.session_id) as n_sessions,
  AVG(sm.fixation_count) as avg_fixation_count,
  AVG(sm.mean_fixation_duration_ms) as avg_fixation_duration,
  AVG(sm.fixation_rate_per_sec) as avg_fixation_rate,
  AVG(sm.scanpath_length) as avg_scanpath_length,
  AVG(sm.saccade_count) as avg_saccade_count,
  AVG(sm.blink_rate_per_min) as avg_blink_rate,
  AVG(sm.gaze_transition_entropy) as avg_gaze_entropy,
  AVG(sm.dwell_time_ms_negative) as avg_dwell_negative,
  AVG(sm.dwell_time_ms_positive) as avg_dwell_positive,
  AVG(sm.dwell_time_ms_neutral) as avg_dwell_neutral,
  AVG(sm.fixation_proportion_negative) as avg_prop_negative,
  AVG(sm.fixation_proportion_positive) as avg_prop_positive,
  AVG(sm.fixation_proportion_neutral) as avg_prop_neutral
FROM anima.scene_metrics sm
JOIN anima.forms f ON sm.session_id = f.session_id
WHERE sm.scene_type = 'stimulus'
GROUP BY f.phq9_severity
ORDER BY 
  CASE f.phq9_severity
    WHEN 'minimal' THEN 1
    WHEN 'mild' THEN 2
    WHEN 'moderate' THEN 3
    WHEN 'moderately_severe' THEN 4
    WHEN 'severe' THEN 5
  END

datasets.name: 002181d6
queryLines:
SELECT
  scene_index,
  (scene_index + 1) / 2 as trial_number,
  scene_valence_pair,
  fixation_count,
  mean_fixation_duration_ms,
  dwell_time_ms_negative,
  dwell_time_ms_positive,
  dwell_time_ms_neutral,
  fixation_proportion_negative,
  fixation_proportion_positive,
  scanpath_length,
  saccade_count,
  blink_count,
  gaze_transition_entropy,
  first_fixation_valence
FROM anima.scene_metrics
WHERE session_id = :selected_session
  AND scene_type = 'stimulus'
ORDER BY scene_index
